mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(A2.BBS_ID , '') AS BBS_ID , COALESCE(A2.SITE_ID , '') AS SITE_ID , COALESCE(A2.BBS_SE , '') AS BBS_SE , COALESCE(A2.BBS_NM , '') AS BBS_NM , COALESCE(A2.BBS_DE , '') AS BBS_DE , COALESCE(A2.TAG_USE_YN , '') AS TAG_USE_YN , COALESCE(A2.ATCH_FILE_CNT , '') AS ATCH_FILE_CNT , COALESCE(A2.ATCH_FILE_SIZE , '') AS ATCH_FILE_SIZE , COALESCE(A2.REPLY_YN , '') AS REPLY_YN , COALESCE(A2.COMMENT_YN , '') AS COMMENT_YN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A2.CRT_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d') , '') AS CRT_DATE , COALESCE(D2.CHG_USER_ID , '') AS CHG_USER_ID , COALESCE(A2.STTUS_CODE , '') AS STTUS_CODE , CASE WHEN COALESCE(A2.STTUS_CODE , '') = 'A' THEN '정상' ELSE '삭제' END AS STTUS_CODE_NM , COALESCE(B2.CODE_NM , '') AS BBS_SE_NM FROM ARMBORD A2 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'ARM001' AND USE_AT = 'Y') B2 ON A2.BBS_SE = B2.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT D3.ESNTL_ID , D3.EMPLYR_ID AS CHG_USER_ID , D3.USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM LETTNEMPLYRINFO D3) D2 ON A2.CHG_USER_ID = D2.ESNTL_ID WHERE A2.STTUS_CODE = 'A'
AND A2.BBS_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A2.BBS_DE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A2.TARGET_GBN = #{targetGbn}
AND A2.BBS_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterBbsNm}, '%')
AND A2.BBS_DE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterBbsDe}, '%')
AND B2.CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterBbsSeNm}, '%')
AND A2.STTUS_CODE = #{filterSttusCode}
ORDER BY A2.BBS_ID DESC

SELECT A1.BBS_ID , A1.SITE_ID , A1.BBS_SE , A1.TARGET_GBN , A1.BBS_NM , COALESCE(A1.BBS_DE, '') AS BBS_DE , A1.TAG_USE_YN , COALESCE(A1.ATCH_FILE_CNT , 0) AS ATCH_FILE_CNT , COALESCE(A1.ATCH_FILE_SIZE, 0) AS ATCH_FILE_SIZE , A1.REPLY_YN , A1.COMMENT_YN , A1.READ_ROLE , A1.WRITE_ROLE , A1.DELETE_ROLE , A1.SECRET_YN , A1.CAPTCHA_AT , A1.PASS_AT , A1.PAGE_PER_LEN , A1.PAGE_LEN , A1.USE_MHRLS , COALESCE(A1.CHRG_DEPT , '') AS CHRG_DEPT , COALESCE(A1.CHARGER_NM, '') AS CHARGER_NM , COALESCE(A1.TLPHON_NO , '') AS TLPHON_NO FROM ARMBORD A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM , CODE_DC FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'ARM001' AND USE_AT = 'Y'
SELECT CONCAT('BBS_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(A1.BBS_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, 0)) AS E_COUP_ID FROM ARMBORD A1

SELECT COALESCE(A2.BBS_ID , '') AS BBS_ID , COALESCE(A2.SITE_ID , '') AS SITE_ID , COALESCE(A2.BBS_SE , '') AS BBS_SE , COALESCE(A2.BBS_NM , '') AS BBS_NM , COALESCE(A2.BBS_DE , '') AS BBS_DE , COALESCE(A2.TAG_USE_YN , '') AS TAG_USE_YN , COALESCE(A2.ATCH_FILE_CNT , '') AS ATCH_FILE_CNT , COALESCE(A2.ATCH_FILE_SIZE , '') AS ATCH_FILE_SIZE , COALESCE(A2.REPLY_YN , '') AS REPLY_YN , COALESCE(A2.COMMENT_YN , '') AS COMMENT_YN , COALESCE(A2.READ_ROLE , '') AS READ_ROLE , COALESCE(A2.WRITE_ROLE , '') AS WRITE_ROLE , COALESCE(A2.DELETE_ROLE , '') AS DELETE_ROLE , COALESCE(A2.SECRET_YN , '') AS SECRET_YN , COALESCE(A2.CAPTCHA_AT , '') AS CAPTCHA_AT , COALESCE(A2.PASS_AT , '') AS PASS_AT , COALESCE(A2.PAGE_PER_LEN , '') AS PAGE_PER_LEN , COALESCE(A2.PAGE_LEN , '') AS PAGE_LEN , COALESCE(A2.USE_MHRLS , '') AS USE_MHRLS , COALESCE(A2.CHRG_DEPT , '') AS CHRG_DEPT , COALESCE(A2.CHARGER_NM , '') AS CHARGER_NM , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(A2.TLPHON_NO, 'N'), '') AS TLPHON_NO , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A2.CRT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS CRT_DATE , COALESCE(A2.STTUS_CODE , '') AS STTUS_CODE , COALESCE(B2.CODE_NM , '') AS CODE_NM FROM ARMBORD A2 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE, CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'ARM001') B2 ON A2.BBS_SE = B2.CODE WHERE A2.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
